training_status: experienced with fasting and extreme diets

benefits.description: Lost 17 lbs in one month, 27 lbs in two months (207 to 180 lbs), effortless weight loss
Extreme appetite suppression, had to force self to eat, minimal cravings

side_effects.description: Nausea in the stomach, rapid ketosis onset causing burning urination without adequate hydration and electrolytes

protocol_notes: User experienced with fasting and extreme diets (IIF, keto, Paleo, heavy calorie restriction). Noted rapid ketosis and emphasized importance of hydration and electrolyte supplementation. Recommends for experienced users but warns of dangers for those unfamiliar with extreme deficits.
